name: INTERRUPTION OF AORTIC ARCH
definition: IAA = rare congenital anomaly with complete luminal and anatomic discontinuity between

demographics.Genetics: chromosome 22q11.2 deletion (50%), DiGeorge syndrome (= hypocalcemia and T-

discriminating_features: ascending aorta much smaller than pulmonary artery
arch formed by pulmonary artery + ductus arteriosus gives the appearance of a low aortic arch

general: ascending aorta much smaller than pulmonary artery
arch formed by pulmonary artery + ductus arteriosus gives the appearance of a low aortic arch
retrosternal clear space increased (small size of ascending aorta)
aberrant right subclavian artery arising from right side of proximal descending thoracic aorta

clinical.Cx: hypoperfusion with acute renal failure + metabolic acidosis
clinical.Prognosis: 59-70% overall survival rate by 16 years of age
clinical.Rx: prostaglandin E1 in neonatal period (to keep the ductus arteriosus open); cardiac surgery
